caption: In a classroom setting with light blue shelving and a brick wall, a man in a light pink long-sleeved shirt stands before a group of children. He holds an open book, which he reads aloud as several children listen attentively. Among the students, one girl wears a light blue shirt, and others are in darker clothing. The children's expressions are focused as they look toward the man or the book. White on-screen text appears at the bottom of the scene, reading "These children will help the Congo." Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a similar posture, holding the book open for the group, while the children maintain their positions, with slight shifts in their gaze and facial expressions as they listen to him.
